title: Design: dark navy high-contrast section layout — fix washed-out light-on-white
description: Use the dark navy from our share cards as background in key homepage sections. The current light-on-white reads washed out and lacks contrast. Color scheme (purple + amber) is fine but needs more contrast. Spec which sections go dark, exact navy hex, text colors on dark bg.

comment.body:
Design spec complete. Identified hero + comparison as the two dark-navy sections (rhythm: dark→light→light→dark). Spec covers exact hex values from share cards (`#1a1a2e`/`#16213e`/`#0f3460`), full text color token table for dark backgrounds (WCAG AA targets), and precise CSS snippets for both sections.

Plan: [TESA-166#document-plan](/TESA/issues/TESA-166#document-plan)

Ready for dev handoff — no ambiguity on which sections go dark or what text/border values to use.
